title: K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
company: K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners:
K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners!
